rationales.hook_strength: "Aging your face" is concrete and mildly contrarian — stops the scroll, though "aging" skews slightly older than the 20–35 core.
rationales.clarity: Each slide owns exactly one mechanism with a single actionable takeaway; no slide tries to do two jobs.
rationales.audience_fit: Stress-clenching and tired mornings land perfectly for the target; the dentist/night-guard slide is practical, not preachy.
rationales.novelty: Jaw tension as a face-shape and sleep issue is a fresher angle than the usual "do jaw exercises" content, though bruxism itself isn't new.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged ("may ease"), no hype words, CTA ties sleep/food/habits directly to the score — textbook Vibe Health voice.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential from the actionable checklist format; shares limited because the hook is personal/vain rather than shareable-to-a-friend.
